creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some problems with the story under https://www.freebsd.org/news/press.html#story201711:01:

1. The "http://synergysky.com" hyperlink does not point to http://synergysky.com. It points to "https://www.freebsd.org/news/press.html" instead.
2. The link to the Synergry SKY homepage should be the name of the company/organization, which is "Synergry SKY", instead of "http://synergysky.com".
